---
title: "PCR"
author: "Graham I. Gordon"
date: "2026-05-09"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(boot)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(pls)
```


```{r}
clickstream <- clickstream %>% mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))

colnames(clickstream)
```

```{r}
train <- sample( 1:nrow(clickstream), size = .7*nrow(clickstream) )
train_df <- clickstream[train, ]
test_df <- clickstream[-train, ]
table(clickstream$price_2)
```

```{r}
library(MASS)  # for fitdistr
library(dplyr)

# Example: your clickstream data
# Each row is a click event; we want the MAX order per session (total clicks)
session_lengths <- clickstream %>%
  group_by(sid) %>%
  summarise(total_clicks = max(order))

# Look at the distribution
hist(session_lengths$total_clicks, 
     breaks = 30,
     main = "Distribution of Session Lengths",
     xlab = "Total Clicks per Session")
```



```{r}
# Fit Negative Binomial to session lengths
fit <- fitdistr(session_lengths$total_clicks, "negative binomial")

# Extract parameters
r  <- fit$estimate["size"]   # dispersion/shape
mu <- fit$estimate["mu"]     # mean session length

cat("r (size):", r, "\n")
cat("mu (mean):", mu, "\n")
```



```{r}
predict_total_clicks <- function(k, r, mu) {
  # Convert mu to probability p
  p <- r / (r + mu)
  
  # Posterior parameters after observing k clicks
  r_post  <- r + k
  mu_post <- mu  # mean shifts; expected additional clicks:
  
  expected_additional <- mu * (r + k) / r  - k
  expected_total      <- k + max(0, expected_additional)
  
  return(list(
    observed       = k,
    expected_total = round(expected_total, 1),
    expected_more  = round(max(0, expected_additional), 1)
  ))
}

# Example: session currently at click 5
predict_total_clicks(k = 5, r = r, mu = mu)

# Example: session currently at click 15
predict_total_clicks(k = 15, r = r, mu = mu)
```

```{r}
# For every session, predict total given clicks so far
live_predictions <- clickstream %>%
  group_by(sid) %>%
  summarise(current_clicks = max(order)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_total = predict_total_clicks(current_clicks, r, mu)$expected_total,
    predicted_more  = predict_total_clicks(current_clicks, r, mu)$expected_more
  )

head(live_predictions)
```


```{r}
# Overlay NBD fit on histogram
x <- 0:max(session_lengths$total_clicks)
nbd_probs <- dnbinom(x, size = r, mu = mu)
```

```{r}
hist(session_lengths$total_clicks,
     breaks = "Sturges",   # let R decide
     freq = FALSE,
     main = "NBD Fit to Session Lengths",
     xlab = "Total Clicks")
```


```{r}
# Diagnose before plotting
cat("Max clicks:", max(session_lengths$total_clicks), "\n")
cat("Num sessions:", nrow(session_lengths), "\n")
cat("Length of x vector:", max(session_lengths$total_clicks) + 1, "\n")
```
